pecron_account.name: Pecron Account Settings
pecron_account.description: Your mobile Pecron cloud app login credentials.

username.name: Pecron Email Address
username.description: The login email associated with your mobile Pecron App.

region.name: Cloud Region
region.description: Select the server location where your Pecron account was created.

device_information.name: Pecron Device Parameters
device_information.description: Identifiers found in your Pecron App device details.

device_name.name: Home Assistant Device Name
device_name.description: What this entity will be displayed as across your dashboards.

product_key.name: Product Key
product_key.description: The specific family model identifier for your power station.

device_key.name: Device Key (ID)
device_key.description: The unique hardware/serial key assigned to your physical unit.

auth_key.name: Local Auth Key (Optional)
auth_key.description: If extracted, allows authenticated high-speed local control bypassing cloud reliance.

lan_ip.name: Device IP Address (Optional)
lan_ip.description: The static local IP of your Pecron unit on your home Wi-Fi network.

connection_mode.name: Data Routing Mode
connection_mode.description: Enforce strict local local polling, pure cloud connection, or let it decide automatically.

mqtt_settings.name: MQTT Broker Integration
mqtt_settings.description: Connection details for your Home Assistant MQTT broker.

mqtt_host.name: MQTT Broker Hostname
mqtt_host.description: IP or address of your broker. Use 'core-mosquitto' if using the official HA add-on.

mqtt_port.name: MQTT Broker Port
mqtt_port.description: The target port for your broker. Standard is 1883.

mqtt_username.name: MQTT Username
mqtt_username.description: Authorized user credentials for writing to the MQTT broker state.

mqtt_password.name: MQTT Password
mqtt_password.description: Password matching your authorized MQTT integration user profile.
